description_long: This is a tall, narrow cabinet with a dark wooden frame and five vertically stacked rectangular drawers. Each drawer features a fabric or textured front panel in a light beige color, with a small rectangular cutout serving as a handle. The cabinet stands on a solid base and has a flat top surface suitable for placing small items. The sides and back of the cabinet are solid wood, with no visible openings or handles. The overall design is simple and functional, making it suitable for storage in urban environments such as hallways, entryways, or garages. The contrasting colors and materials give it a modern yet practical appearance.
description: A tall, dark wood cabinet with five beige fabric-front drawers and cutout handles, designed for practical storage. Its simple, modern look suits urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing five beige drawers with cutout handles framed by dark wood.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid dark wood frame and the plain sides of the drawers, with no handles visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front but without visible handles, showing the back panels of the drawers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the solid wood frame and plain drawer sides.
